# FiberTools — Free Calculators for Knitters, Crocheters & Weavers
> https://fibertools.app

FiberTools is a suite of 31 free, browser-based calculators and references for fiber arts — knitting, crochet, weaving, spinning, embroidery, and cross stitch. Built with 30+ years of fiber arts expertise to ensure accurate terminology, correct math, and real-world usefulness.

All processing happens client-side — no data is sent to any server. No login required. Works offline. Every tool includes educational content, expert tips, and FAQ sections.

## Tools

### Knitting & Crochet
- [Yarn Calculator](https://fibertools.app/yarn-calculator): Calculate exactly how much yarn you need for any project — blankets, sweaters, scarves, and more.
- [Needle & Hook Size Converter](https://fibertools.app/needle-converter): Convert knitting needle and crochet hook sizes between US, UK, metric, and Japanese systems.
- [Gauge Calculator](https://fibertools.app/gauge-calculator): Calculate your gauge from a swatch, resize patterns to a new gauge, and get exact stitch counts.
- [Yarn Weight Chart](https://fibertools.app/yarn-weight-chart): Interactive yarn weight chart with US, UK, and Australian names plus substitution compatibility checker.
- [Stitch Counter](https://fibertools.app/stitch-counter): Free online stitch counter with multiple counters, row reminders, and offline support.
- [Blanket Calculator](https://fibertools.app/blanket-calculator): Find the right stitch count, row count, and yarn yardage for any blanket size from baby to king.
- [Increase & Decrease Calculator](https://fibertools.app/increase-decrease-calculator): Get stitch-by-stitch instructions for distributing increases or decreases evenly across a row or round.
- [Stripe Generator](https://fibertools.app/stripe-generator): Generate random or structured stripe patterns with per-color yardage estimates.
- [Abbreviation Glossary](https://fibertools.app/abbreviation-glossary): Searchable glossary of knitting and crochet abbreviations with US/UK toggle.
- [Stitch Pattern Calculator](https://fibertools.app/stitch-pattern-calculator): Find compatible stitch counts for sampler blankets with 50+ stitch patterns.
- [Stitch Quick Reference](https://fibertools.app/stitch-quick-reference): Visual step-by-step for every basic crochet and knitting stitch.
- [UK to US Converter](https://fibertools.app/uk-to-us-converter): Convert UK crochet patterns to US terminology and vice versa.
- [Perfect Circle Calculator](https://fibertools.app/circle-calculator): Generate flat circle crochet patterns with staggered increases.
- [Sewing & Craft Needle Guide](https://fibertools.app/needle-guide): Visual guide to needle types for every project.
- [Amigurumi Shapes Guide](https://fibertools.app/amigurumi-shapes): Round-by-round instructions for sphere, cone, cylinder, and oval shapes.
- [Project Cost Calculator](https://fibertools.app/project-cost-calculator): Calculate the total cost of your project including yarn, notions, and time estimate.
- [Color Pooling Calculator](https://fibertools.app/color-pooling-calculator): Calculate the exact stitch count to make variegated yarn pool into argyle and plaid patterns.
- [WPI to Yarn Weight Converter](https://fibertools.app/wpi-calculator): Enter wraps per inch to identify yarn weight, recommended needles, hooks, gauge range, and project ideas.
- [Cast On Calculator](https://fibertools.app/cast-on-calculator): Calculate how many stitches to cast on for any width with stitch pattern multiple rounding.
- [Hat Size Calculator](https://fibertools.app/hat-calculator): Get cast-on count, crown decrease schedule, and yardage for any head size from preemie to large adult.
- [Sock Knitting Calculator](https://fibertools.app/sock-calculator): Calculate sock stitch counts for top-down or toe-up with heel flap, gusset, and short-row heel instructions.
- [Sleeve Shaping Calculator](https://fibertools.app/sleeve-calculator): Get row-by-row decrease instructions for tapered sleeves in knit or crochet.
- [Raglan Calculator](https://fibertools.app/raglan-calculator): Calculate neck cast-on, stitch distribution, and increase rounds for a top-down raglan sweater.
- [Blocking Calculator](https://fibertools.app/blocking-calculator): Get the right blocking method for your fiber type with stretch feasibility ratings and step-by-step instructions.
- [Yarn Stash Estimator](https://fibertools.app/stash-estimator): Estimate remaining yardage in partial skeins by weight, plus a yardage reference table for unlabeled yarn.

### Crochet
- [C2C Blanket Calculator](https://fibertools.app/c2c-calculator): Plan your corner-to-corner crochet blanket with block counts, diagonal rows, and yardage estimates.
- [Granny Square Planner](https://fibertools.app/granny-square-planner): Plan a granny square blanket with grid layout, total squares, per-color yardage, and joining yarn estimates.

### Spinning
- [Spinning Ratio Calculator](https://fibertools.app/spinning-ratio-calculator): Calculate drive ratios, twists per inch, and plying ratios for handspinning.

### Weaving
- [Weaving Sett Calculator](https://fibertools.app/weaving-sett-calculator): Find the right sett (EPI) for your yarn and weave structure, plus warp length and reed substitution.

### Cross Stitch
- [Cross Stitch Calculator](https://fibertools.app/cross-stitch-calculator): Calculate finished dimensions for any fabric count and estimate thread amounts per color.

### Embroidery
- [Thread Converter](https://fibertools.app/thread-converter): Convert between DMC, Anchor, Cosmo, and Sulky embroidery thread numbers.

## Blog Posts

- [How Much Yarn Do I Need?](https://fibertools.app/blog/yarn-calculator-guide): The complete guide to calculating yarn for any project — blankets, sweaters, scarves, and more.
- [Knitting Needle & Crochet Hook Size Chart](https://fibertools.app/blog/needle-size-chart-guide): US, Metric, UK & Japanese size conversion chart for needles and hooks.
- [How to Calculate and Adjust Gauge](https://fibertools.app/blog/gauge-calculator-guide): Why gauge matters, how to measure it, and how to resize patterns.
- [Yarn Weight Chart](https://fibertools.app/blog/yarn-weight-chart-guide): From lace to jumbo with needle sizes and gauge ranges.
- [How to Count Stitches and Rows](https://fibertools.app/blog/stitch-counter-guide): Tips for accurate stitch and row tracking in knitting and crochet.
- [Blanket Size Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/blanket-size-guide): Standard dimensions for baby, throw, and bed blankets.
- [How to Increase and Decrease Evenly](https://fibertools.app/blog/increase-decrease-guide): The math made easy for distributing increases or decreases across a row.
- [How to Plan Stripe Patterns](https://fibertools.app/blog/stripe-pattern-guide): Random, weighted, and sequence stripes with yardage planning.
- [Knitting and Crochet Abbreviations](https://fibertools.app/blog/knitting-abbreviations-guide): The complete reference guide to abbreviations.
- [Spinning Wheel Ratios Explained](https://fibertools.app/blog/spinning-wheel-guide): How to calculate drive ratio and TPI for handspinning.
- [Cross Stitch Fabric Calculator](https://fibertools.app/blog/cross-stitch-fabric-guide): How to figure out the right size Aida cloth.
- [How to Calculate Sett for Weaving](https://fibertools.app/blog/weaving-sett-guide): EPI guide for every yarn weight.
- [How Much Does It Cost to Crochet a Blanket?](https://fibertools.app/blog/project-cost-guide): The honest price breakdown for handmade projects.
- [Color Pooling Calculator Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/color-pooling-guide): How to plan pooling with variegated yarn.
- [DMC to Anchor Thread Conversion](https://fibertools.app/blog/thread-conversion-guide): The complete searchable embroidery thread conversion chart.
- [Stitch Multiples for Sampler Blankets](https://fibertools.app/blog/stitch-multiples-sampler-blanket-guide): How to calculate compatible stitch counts for sampler blankets.
- [Crochet Stitch Quick Reference](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-stitch-quick-reference-guide): Yarn overs, pull-throughs, and turning chains explained.
- [How to Crochet Basic Amigurumi Shapes](https://fibertools.app/blog/amigurumi-shapes-guide): How to crochet basic amigurumi shapes including spheres, cones, cylinders, and ovals with round-by-round instructions.
- [How to Block Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/blog/blocking-calculator-guide): How to block knitting and crochet projects by fiber type with stretch ratings and step-by-step instructions.
- [Corner-to-Corner Crochet (C2C) Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/c2c-crochet-guide): How to plan a corner-to-corner crochet blanket with block counts, diagonal rows, and yardage estimates.
- [How Many Stitches to Cast On](https://fibertools.app/blog/cast-on-guide): How to calculate the right cast-on stitch count for any width with stitch pattern multiples and edge stitches.
- [How to Crochet a Perfect Flat Circle](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-circle-guide): How to crochet a flat circle using staggered increases for any stitch type and size.
- [How to Plan a Granny Square Blanket](https://fibertools.app/blog/granny-square-guide): How to plan a granny square blanket with grid layout, total squares, per-color yardage, and joining estimates.
- [How to Calculate Hat Size for Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/blog/hat-calculator-guide): How to calculate cast-on count, crown decreases, and yardage for any head size from preemie to adult.
- [Sewing and Craft Needle Types Explained](https://fibertools.app/blog/needle-guide-types): A visual guide to every needle type for fiber arts including tapestry, embroidery, chenille, and beading needles.
- [How to Calculate a Top-Down Raglan Sweater](https://fibertools.app/blog/raglan-sweater-guide): How to calculate neck cast-on, stitch distribution, and increase rounds for a top-down raglan sweater.
- [How to Calculate Sleeve Shaping](https://fibertools.app/blog/sleeve-calculator-guide): How to calculate row-by-row decrease instructions for tapered knit and crochet sleeves.
- [Sock Knitting Calculator Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/sock-knitting-guide): How to calculate sock stitch counts for top-down or toe-up construction with heel and gusset instructions.
- [How to Estimate Yarn Yardage in Partial Skeins](https://fibertools.app/blog/stash-estimator-guide): How to estimate remaining yardage in partial skeins by weight with a yardage reference table.
- [UK vs US Crochet Terms Conversion](https://fibertools.app/blog/uk-us-crochet-terms-guide): How to convert UK crochet patterns to US terminology including abbreviations and vintage terms.
- [How to Identify Mystery Yarn Using WPI](https://fibertools.app/blog/mystery-yarn-wpi-guide): How to measure wraps per inch to identify unknown yarn weight, plus burn and water tests for fiber content.
- [How to Plan a Temperature Blanket](https://fibertools.app/blog/temperature-blanket-planning-guide): Color assignments, yarn estimation, and size calculations for a year-long temperature blanket project.
- [How to Convert Knitting Patterns to Crochet](https://fibertools.app/blog/knitting-to-crochet-conversion-guide): Step-by-step conversion guide with gauge ratios, stitch equivalents, and yarn adjustments between crafts.
- [Beginner's Guide to Rigid Heddle Weaving](https://fibertools.app/blog/rigid-heddle-weaving-guide): Learn rigid heddle weaving from warping to finishing with sett calculations and first project ideas.
- [How to Choose the Right Crochet Hook Size](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-hook-size-guide): US, metric, and UK hook size chart with yarn weight matching and gauge adjustment tips.
- [How to Estimate Knitting and Crochet Project Time](https://fibertools.app/blog/project-time-estimation-guide): Calculate stitches per minute, total project time, and realistic deadlines for any fiber arts project.
- [How to Work with Variegated and Self-Striping Yarn](https://fibertools.app/blog/variegated-yarn-guide): Best stitches, planned pooling technique, and tips for getting beautiful results from multicolor yarn.
- [How to Add Borders to Knit and Crochet Projects](https://fibertools.app/blog/knit-crochet-borders-guide): Stitch pickup ratios, corner math, popular border styles, and yarn estimation for edgings.
- [How to Calculate Yarn for Crochet Garments](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-garment-yarn-guide): Yardage charts for crochet tops, cardigans, and dresses with the crochet yarn multiplier explained.
- [How to Plan a Color-Block Blanket](https://fibertools.app/blog/color-block-blanket-guide): Color selection, block proportions, per-color yarn estimation, and construction methods for modern blankets.
- [How to Crochet a Graphghan (Picture Blanket)](https://fibertools.app/blog/graphghan-crochet-guide): Plan a graphghan with pixel charts, per-color yarn estimation, and C2C stitch technique.
- [How to Choose Yarn for Baby Projects](https://fibertools.app/blog/baby-yarn-guide): Fiber safety, washability, softness, and yardage guide for baby blankets, clothing, and accessories.
- [How to Calculate Yarn for Shawls and Wraps](https://fibertools.app/blog/shawl-yarn-calculation-guide): Yardage calculation for triangular, rectangular, and crescent shawls by yarn weight.
- [How to Plan a Mosaic Crochet Project](https://fibertools.app/blog/mosaic-crochet-guide): Mosaic crochet technique with stitch multiples, chart reading, and overlay vs inset methods.
- [How to Use Stitch Markers in Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/blog/stitch-markers-guide): Types, placement techniques, and strategies for tracking pattern repeats, shaping, and rounds.
- [How to Seam Knit and Crochet Pieces Together](https://fibertools.app/blog/seaming-knit-crochet-guide): Mattress stitch, whip stitch, slip stitch join, and three-needle bind-off with yarn estimation.
- [How to Fix Common Crochet Mistakes](https://fibertools.app/blog/fix-crochet-mistakes-guide): Troubleshooting wrong stitch count, uneven edges, skewed fabric, and tension problems.
- [How to Estimate Thread for Cross Stitch Projects](https://fibertools.app/blog/cross-stitch-thread-guide): Thread per stitch by fabric count, per-color estimation, and specialty stitch calculations.
- [How to Plan Knit and Crochet Gifts on a Deadline](https://fibertools.app/blog/gift-knitting-deadline-guide): Project selection by timeline, time estimation, and strategies to finish handmade gifts on time.
- [How to Calculate Yarn for Accessories](https://fibertools.app/blog/accessories-yarn-guide): Yardage charts for hats, mittens, cowls, scarves, and fingerless gloves by yarn weight and size.
- [How to Knit and Crochet in the Round](https://fibertools.app/blog/knitting-in-the-round-guide): Circular needles, DPNs, magic loop, and crochet spiral techniques for seamless hats, socks, and garments.
- [How to Wash and Care for Handknits](https://fibertools.app/blog/washing-handknits-guide): Fiber-specific washing, drying, and storage instructions for wool, acrylic, cotton, silk, and alpaca handmade items.
- [How to Choose Yarn Colors That Work Together](https://fibertools.app/blog/yarn-color-selection-guide): Color theory, contrast, and palette planning for knitting and crochet projects.
- [Tunisian Crochet for Beginners](https://fibertools.app/blog/tunisian-crochet-guide): Simple stitch, knit stitch, and purl stitch with hook selection, gauge tips, and beginner projects.
- [How to Plan an Intarsia Colorwork Project](https://fibertools.app/blog/intarsia-colorwork-guide): Intarsia technique for large color blocks and picture knitting with bobbin management and yarn estimation.
- [How to Plan a Tapestry Crochet Project](https://fibertools.app/blog/tapestry-crochet-guide): Tapestry crochet technique for colorwork bags, baskets, and blankets with carrying yarn and tension tips.
- [Knitting Bind-Off Methods Explained](https://fibertools.app/blog/bind-off-methods-guide): Standard, stretchy, three-needle, i-cord, and picot bind-offs with when to use each method.
- [How to Plan and Crochet a Wearable Top](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-top-guide): Sizing, yarn selection, construction methods, and yardage for crochet tank tops, crop tops, and blouses.
- [How to Knit and Crochet with Handspun Yarn](https://fibertools.app/blog/handspun-yarn-projects-guide): Gauge management, yarn characterization, project selection, and yardage estimation for handspun fiber.
- [How to Calculate Yarn for Ponchos and Capes](https://fibertools.app/blog/poncho-yarn-calculation-guide): Construction methods, sizing, and yarn estimation for knit and crochet ponchos and capes.
- [Brioche Knitting for Beginners](https://fibertools.app/blog/brioche-knitting-guide): Brioche stitch basics, two-color brioche, gauge differences, and yarn estimation for this plush technique.
- [Knitting vs Crochet: How to Choose](https://fibertools.app/blog/knitting-vs-crochet-guide): Side-by-side comparison of speed, fabric, tools, yarn usage, and best project types for each craft.
- [Lace Knitting and Crochet Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/lace-knitting-crochet-guide): Yarn overs, chart reading, blocking techniques, and yarn selection for knit and crochet lace.
- [How to Plan a Cable Knitting Project](https://fibertools.app/blog/cable-knitting-guide): Rope cables, braids, honeycomb patterns with stitch multiples, gauge adjustments, and extra yarn estimation.
- [Arm Knitting and Finger Knitting Guide](https://fibertools.app/blog/arm-knitting-guide): Chunky blankets, scarves, and home decor with no needles required. Technique and yarn estimation.
- [How to Calculate Warp for Weaving](https://fibertools.app/blog/weaving-warp-calculation-guide): Warp ends, length, loom waste, take-up, shrinkage, and total yardage formulas for any weaving project.
- [How to Plan and Crochet a Market Bag](https://fibertools.app/blog/crochet-market-bag-guide): Mesh, solid, and granny stitch market bags with sizing, yarn selection, and handle construction.
- [How to Add Eyes and Features to Amigurumi](https://fibertools.app/blog/amigurumi-features-guide): Safety eyes, embroidered features, placement rules, and expression techniques for crochet amigurumi.
- [How to Knit or Crochet a Blanket Scarf](https://fibertools.app/blog/blanket-scarf-guide): Sizing, stitch patterns, and yardage for oversized blanket scarves and wraps.
- [How to Work Short Rows in Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/blog/short-rows-guide): Wrap and turn, German short rows, and crochet short rows for heels, shoulders, and bust darts.

## Guides

- [How to Read a Yarn Label](https://fibertools.app/guides/reading-yarn-labels): Complete guide to yarn weight symbols, care instructions, dye lots, and gauge information on yarn labels.
- [Knitting Gauge: Why It Matters](https://fibertools.app/guides/knitting-gauge-guide): How to make a gauge swatch, block it, measure it, and resize patterns when your gauge doesn't match.
- [How Much Yarn for a Blanket?](https://fibertools.app/guides/blanket-yarn-guide): Yardage estimates by blanket size and yarn weight, from baby blankets to king-size bedspreads.
- [Knitting Needle Sizes Explained](https://fibertools.app/guides/needle-sizes-guide): US, UK, and metric needle sizing systems explained, plus how to identify unlabeled needles.
- [UK vs US Crochet Terms](https://fibertools.app/guides/uk-us-crochet-terms-guide): Complete conversion guide between UK and US crochet terminology with full chart.
- [What is WPI and How to Measure It](https://fibertools.app/guides/wpi-guide): How wraps per inch works, how to measure it, and WPI ranges for every yarn weight category.
- [How to Price Handmade Knitting and Crochet](https://fibertools.app/guides/pricing-handmade-guide): Calculate the real cost of handmade items including materials, time, and pricing for commissions.
- [Beginner's Guide to Amigurumi](https://fibertools.app/guides/amigurumi-beginners-guide): Shapes, sizes, and math for crochet amigurumi including magic ring, increases, and connecting parts.
- [How to Crochet a Flat Circle](https://fibertools.app/guides/flat-circle-crochet-guide): Why you increase by 6 every round, how to fix cupping and ruffling, and round-by-round stitch counts.
- [Sewing & Craft Needle Types](https://fibertools.app/guides/sewing-craft-needle-guide): Tapestry, chenille, sharps, betweens, and other needle types explained with use cases.
- [Hat Sizing Guide](https://fibertools.app/guides/knit-crochet-hat-sizing-guide): Head circumference charts, negative ease, crown shaping methods, and brim options.
- [Knitting Socks: Sizing & Construction](https://fibertools.app/guides/knitting-socks-sizing-guide): Sock anatomy, heel construction options, top-down vs toe-up, and yarn recommendations.
- [Sleeve Shaping Guide](https://fibertools.app/guides/knitting-sleeve-shaping-guide): How to calculate tapers, sleeve lengths by size, and sleeve cap shaping for set-in sleeves.
- [Top-Down Raglan Sweaters](https://fibertools.app/guides/raglan-sweater-guide): Raglan increase math, neckline options, stitch distribution, and sizing from measurements.
- [How to Block Knitting & Crochet](https://fibertools.app/guides/blocking-fiber-guide): Wet, steam, and spray blocking methods with fiber-specific recommendations.
- [Yarn Stash Management](https://fibertools.app/guides/yarn-stash-management-guide): Estimating yardage from partial skeins, organizing your stash, and scrap yarn project ideas.
- [Corner-to-Corner Crochet (C2C)](https://fibertools.app/guides/c2c-crochet-guide): How C2C construction works, increase and decrease rows, and sizing for graphghans.
- [Granny Square Blankets](https://fibertools.app/guides/granny-square-blanket-guide): Layout planning, square counts, joining methods, and border finishing.
- [Knitting Cast-On Methods](https://fibertools.app/guides/cast-on-methods-guide): Long-tail, cable, tubular, and more — stretch levels, difficulty, and best use cases.
- [Crochet Stitch Reference](https://fibertools.app/guides/crochet-stitch-reference-guide): Basic stitches, stitch height, reading diagrams, and common stitch combinations.
- [Yarn Stripe Patterns](https://fibertools.app/guides/yarn-stripe-patterns-guide): Color planning, carrying yarn vs cutting, weaving in ends, and yardage calculation.

## Category Landing Pages

- [Free Crochet Calculators & Tools](https://fibertools.app/crochet-tools): All crochet-relevant calculators in one place — yarn, gauge, hooks, amigurumi, granny squares, C2C, and more.
- [Free Knitting Calculators & Tools](https://fibertools.app/knitting-tools): All knitting-relevant calculators in one place — yarn, gauge, needles, sweaters, socks, hats, and more.
- [Free Weaving & Spinning Calculators](https://fibertools.app/weaving-tools): Calculators for weavers and spinners — sett, EPI, drive ratio, TPI, and yarn weight.

## Buying Guides

- [Best Yarn for Beginners (2026)](https://fibertools.app/best-yarn-for-beginners): Expert picks for the best beginner yarn — smooth, affordable worsted weight acrylic for knitting and crochet.
- [Best Knitting Needles (2026)](https://fibertools.app/best-knitting-needles): Straight, circular, and interchangeable needle recommendations for every budget and skill level.
- [Best Crochet Hooks (2026)](https://fibertools.app/best-crochet-hooks): Ergonomic, aluminum, and steel crochet hook recommendations for beginners and experienced crocheters.
- [Best Yarn for Blankets (2026)](https://fibertools.app/best-yarn-for-blankets): Soft, washable, budget-friendly yarn picks for throw, baby, and chunky blankets.
- [Best Yarn for Amigurumi (2026)](https://fibertools.app/best-yarn-for-amigurumi): Cotton and acrylic yarn picks for tight gauge, clean stitch definition, and vibrant amigurumi colors.

## About
- [About FiberTools](https://fibertools.app/about): Learn about FiberTools and the fiber arts expertise behind these calculators.
